---
title: "Crime Scene"
description: "Crime scene images from the Narin Güran case."
lightbox:
  match: auto
  effect: fade
  desc-position: right
  loop: true
page-layout: full
---

> This category is currently empty. New images will appear here as they are added.

<!-- Example usage:
::: {layout-ncol=3}
![Short alt text](img/example1.jpg){
  group="olay-yeri"
  description="**Title**<br>27 August 2024, Bağlar/Diyarbakır<br>Brief description."
}
:::
-->
